query: Satya Nadella Build 2026 keynote details Scout Autopilot release

Microsoft AI Microsoft Security Dynamics 365 Microsoft 365 Microsoft Power Platform Microsoft Teams Microsoft 365 Copilot Small Business Azure Microsoft Developer Microsoft Learn Support for AI marketplace apps Microsoft Tech Community Microsoft Marketplace Software companies Visual Studio Careers About Microsoft Company news Privacy at Microsoft Investors Diversity and inclusion Accessibility Sustainability"},{"url":"https://mashable.com/tech/microsoft-build-2026-keynote-everything-we-learned","title":"Everything we learned from the Microsoft Build 2026 keynote | Mashable","content":""MAI-Thinking-1 was designed to be good at complex multi-step instructions, long context reasoning, and code generation," said Kyle Daigle, Microsoft Developer CMO and COO of GitHub, at a virtual media briefing ahead of the keynote.
MAI-Image-2.5 and a Flash variant
Think Copilot, but a more powerful version that can work across apps.
The company said Microsoft Scout will be the first of a new type of customizable AI agents from Microsoft called Autopilots.
“Agents can execute multi-step workflows locally while running inside an operating system-enforced boundary rather than unmanaged user sessions,” said Kyle Daigle, Microsoft Developer CMO, at a media briefing ahead of the keynote.
His book on the history of Star Wars is an international bestseller and has been translated into 11 languages.
We don't know all the details yet, though."},{"url":"https://www.theverge.com/tech/941668/microsoft-build-may-2026-live-news-updates","title":"Microsoft Build 2026: All the news about Windows, AI, RTX Spark, and more | The Verge","content":"At Computex 2026 in Taipei, Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang confirmed at least two additional generations of RTX Spark are already planned.
Get the day’s best comment and more in my free newsletter, The Verge Daily.
Microsoft just kicked off Build 2026 with a keynote from CEO Satya Nadella and other company leaders.
Microsoft launches its Command Line blog during Build 2026.
Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella has started his Build developer keynote by focusing on Windows immediately.
Microsoft is expanding Windows AI APIs to more PCs, through CPU, GPU, and NPU support.
The Build keynote kicks off at 9:30AM PT / 12:30PM ET / 5:30PM UK."},{"url":"https://semiconalpha.substack.com/p/microsoft-build-2026-satya-nadella","title":"Microsoft Build 2026. Satya Nadella Keynote Executive Summary & Full Transcript","content":"Gianrico Farrugia (Mayo Clinic), and the Chainsmokers (Mantis VC)"},{"url":"https://jannikreinhard.com/microsoft-build-2026-agentic-stack/","title":"Microsoft Build 2026: Essential Guide to 13 Best Agent Wins","content":"Microsoft IQ (generally available across GitHub Copilot, Microsoft Foundry and Copilot Studio) is a context layer that grounds agents in both enterprise knowledge and world knowledge.
New at Microsoft Build 2026: an AI-first, model-agnostic, MCP-native web search stack that returns relevant passages at roughly 2.5x the speed of the next best alternative.
Availability is the reality check: Scout is an experimental release through the Frontier program.
WSL2 with native GPU passthrough, CUDA, VS Code and Copilot come pre-configured.
Two announcements aimed past the enterprise.
Agent 365 and Purview enforcement are the unglamorous prerequisites."}]}

Microsoft is so keen to help you deploy AI agents, it's building its own version of OpenClaw — and a new agentic OS based on Android rather than Windows. CEO Satya Nadella doubled down on AI agents and tools during his keynote at the company's annual Microsoft Build conference for developers on Tuesday. That included a first look at Project Soltera, an Android-based software platform which Microsoft calls "a chip-to-cloud platform designed for an open, multiple agent world that expands how agents are built, deployed and experienced.". Nadella unveiled Microsoft's first reasoning AI model, the first in a new suite of MAI models. "MAI-Thinking-1 was designed to be good at complex multi-step instructions, long context reasoning, and code generation," said Kyle Daigle, Microsoft Developer CMO and COO of GitHub, at a virtual media briefing ahead of the keynote. ","score":0.73299384,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.theverge.com/tech/941668/microsoft-build-may-2026-live-news-updates","title":"Microsoft Build 2026: All the news about Windows, AI, RTX ...","content":"# Microsoft Build 2026: All the news about Windows, AI, RTX Spark, and more. Microsoft Build 2026 kicked off with a keynote presentation that introduced some developer-focused Windows updates, an OpenClaw-based AI assistant called Scout, the new Majorana 2 quantum computing chip, and a Surface mini PC designed for AI developers. Microsoft also rolled out a new Android-based OS called Project Solara that’s designed for gadgets that run AI agents. But the reality is that we are in partnership with OpenAI for years and years to come… So naturally, that’s going to continue. I can’t remember the last time Microsoft kicked off a Build keynote with Windows front and center, but that’s exactly what CEO **Satya Nadella** did this week. I got a chance to take a closer look at both the Surface Laptop Ultra and Surface RTX Spark Dev Box at Microsoft’s Build conference this week, and while both have the same chip inside, they’re utilizing Nvidia’s RTX Spark in different ways.","score":0.7311551,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=X5IvkUxfqms","title":"Microsoft Build 2026 - Top Announcements","content":"Microsoft Build 2026 - Top Announcements

3 Jun 2026
Microsoft Build 2026 was all about one idea: agent-first — a shift from software you operate to agents that do the work for you. I've cut through the 100+ announcements to the key announcements that actually matter for business users and decision-makers, with a plain-English "what it is and why it matters" for each.

------------------------------
Thank you for supporting my channel:
☕ Buy me a coffee: https://www.buymeacoffee.com/lisacrosbie
📘 Get my book - Copilot Studio Step by Step: https://www.microsoftpressstore.com/store/microsoft-copilot-studio-step-by-step-customizing-copilot-9780135491539 (Also available on Amazon)
🤝 Follow me on LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/lisa-crosbie/
---------------------------

In this video:
The "agent-first" theme and the Copilot journey: Chat → Cowork → Code → Autopilots
Autopilots — a brand-new category of always-on agents that work in the background, within your security and compliance
Microsoft Scout — the first Autopilot, a personal agent living across Teams, Outlook, OneDrive and SharePoint
Work IQ APIs — the intelligence layer behind Microsoft 365, opened up to any agent (GA June 16, 2026)
Cost Management — a new admin-centre dashboard to see and control AI spend
Frontier Tuning — teaching AI how your business actually works, inside your own compliance boundary
Project Solara — a platform and devices built for agent-first work (desk device + wearable badge)
Web IQ — fresh, verifiable web grounding for agents
Who this is for: business leaders, IT decision-makers, and anyone trying to make sense of what Build 2026 means for the way their teams work.

🔗 Key links

Microsoft Build 2026 hub: https://build.microsoft.com/(opens in new window)
Official keynote recap (covers the full IQ family, Web IQ, Cost Management & Solara): https://blogs.microsoft.com/blog/2026/06/02/microsoft-build-2026-be-yourself-at-work/(opens in new window)
Introducing Microsoft Scout: https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/microsoft-365/blog/2026/06/02/introducing-microsoft-scout-your-always-on-personal-agent/(opens in new window)
Work IQ — production-ready intelligence for every agent: https://devblogs.microsoft.com/microsoft365dev/work-iq-production-ready-intelligence-for-every-agent/(opens in new window)
Work IQ on GitHub: https://github.com/microsoft/work-iq(opens in new window)
Frontier Tuning explained: https://devblogs.microsoft.com/microsoft365dev/frontier-tuning-teaching-ai-to-work-the-way-you-do/
